# Pull Request Template

## Description

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #... / Fixes #... -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, docstrings)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass locally (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
